channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Travis Head and wife face online abuse after IPL clash with Virat Kohli
item.description: Australian cricketer Travis Head and his wife Jessica have reportedly been subjected to severe online abuse following a heated on-field exchange between Head and Indian star Virat Kohli during an Indi...

item.title: Family Finally Buries Bishop George Kaye in Bungoma after Seven-Month Delay in US Mortuary
item.description: The family of Bishop George Kaye finally laid him to rest in Bungoma, Kenya, after his body stayed in a mortuary in the United States for seven months due to financial challenges. Bishop Kaye died in ...

item.title: KwaZulu-Natal clubs celebrate strong Betway Premiership season with three teams qualifying for MTN8
item.description: AmaZulu FC coach Arthur Zwane has praised the progress of football in KwaZulu-Natal after three clubs from the province secured places in next season’s MTN8 competition. AmaZulu, Golden Arrows and Dur...

item.title: How AI is transforming search and reshaping digital marketing strategies
item.description: This sponsored feature explores how artificial intelligence is reshaping online search and what that means for brands and marketers. According to Google’s Matthew Rivard, search is shifting from tradi...

item.title: Final year Kogi health sciences student dies in Lokoja road accident after completing exams
item.description: A tragic road accident has claimed the life of a final year student, Ismail Abdulkarim, shortly after he completed his final examinations at the Community Health Department of the Kogi State College o...

item.title: Cockroach as a Political Metaphor: Satire, Resistance and Digital Movements in Contemporary India
item.description: The article explores how the cockroach has emerged as a powerful political metaphor in contemporary discourse, particularly in India, reflecting themes of resilience, marginalisation and resistance. I...

item.title: APC Confirms Tinubu as Presidential Candidate for 2027 Election After Landslide Primary Win
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) has officially endorsed President Bola Ahmed Tinubu as its presidential candidate for the 2027 general elections following a nationwide direct primary exercise held...

item.title: Leicester City Women relegated from the WSL after playoff defeat to Charlton Athletic; Alisha Lehmann absent due to injury
item.description: Leicester City Women have been relegated from the Women’s Super League (WSL) after a dramatic and painful defeat to Charlton Athletic in a promotion-relegation playoff decided by penalties. The match ...

item.title: Meghan Markle shares family preferences for her homemade jam flavours
item.description: Meghan Markle has shared a light-hearted update about her family's preferences for the different flavours of jam produced under her As Ever lifestyle brand. In a recent Instagram post promoting her ra...

item.title: Cheslin Kolbe to rejoin Stormers after ending successful stint in Japan
item.description: Springbok star Cheslin Kolbe has officially confirmed that he and his family will return to South Africa after spending three successful seasons in Japan with Tokyo Suntory Sungoliath. Reports over th...

item.title: Job applicant struggles after being left without response following summer interview
item.description: The letter published in the Miss Manners advice column describes a situation involving a young job seeker who applied for a summer position earlier in the year. After expressing interest in a job open...

item.title: Westend Seniors Activity Centre highlights Alberta’s upcoming Seniors Week celebration and community support event
item.description: This article focuses on an upcoming seniors-focused community initiative in Alberta tied to the broader Seniors Week celebrations. Alberta’s largest Seniors Week event is set to return on June 4, feat...

item.title: Kenyan Newspaper Review Highlights Security Concerns and Political Controversy Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Kenyan newspapers on Monday, May 25, 2026, carried reports focusing on two major national issues: a security incident involving President William Ruto and growing political controversy linked to remar...

item.title: Dr Max Pemberton analyses relationship patterns and trauma in Katie Price’s public life
item.description: In this opinion piece, Dr Max Pemberton reflects on the highly publicised personal life of Katie Price, particularly focusing on her repeated relationship breakdowns and marriages. He argues that rath...

item.title: Calgary’s Live Younger clinic highlights personalised hormone-focused preventive wellness care
item.description: This article presents a sponsored segment featuring Live Younger, a private wellness and medical aesthetics clinic based in Calgary. The clinic is highlighted during a QR Calgary “Talk to the Experts”...

item.title: Man shot dead near the White House after opening fire; previously charged with trespassing
item.description: Nasire Best, a 21-year-old man, was shot and killed by US Secret Service officers after allegedly opening fire near the White House in Washington, DC. According to law enforcement statements, Best pro...

item.title: Officials Race to Stabilize Overheated Chemical Tank at Orange County Aerospace Facility
item.description: Emergency crews in Garden Grove, Orange County, are engaged in an urgent and ongoing operation to prevent a potential explosion at an aerospace facility where a pressurized tank containing a toxic che...

item.title: Phyna opens up about financial struggles, family pressure, and life after winning BBNaija
item.description: Former BBNaija winner Phyna, whose real name na Josephina Otabor, don open up emotionally about the financial and family pressure wey she faced after winning ₦100 million from the reality show. During...

item.title: Republican senators clash with Todd Blanche over Trump administration’s anti-weaponisation compensation fund
item.description: Republican senators reportedly confronted acting Attorney General Todd Blanche during a closed-door briefing about the Trump administration’s proposed 1.8 billion dollar “anti-weaponisation” fund. Acc...

item.title: RAF aircraft carrying Defence Secretary experiences suspected GPS jamming near Russian border
item.description: An RAF Dassault Falcon 900LX aircraft carrying the UK Defence Secretary John Healey reportedly experienced electronic interference believed to have been caused by Russia while returning from Estonia t...
